revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:弁財天 (白井市)]]
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Benzaiten | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = {{image requested|cat=Shiroi, Chiba|qq=}} |location = {{ill|Shiroi|en|Shiroi|qid=Q519187|lt=Shiroi, Chiba|1=Shiroi}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}} (602 Kiyodo) |Map = |Deities = {{ill|Benzaiten|ja|弁財天|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benzaiten|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁才天}}, {{ill|Ryūjin|ja|竜神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 龍神}} |Rank = |consecration_year = Daidō Era (806–810 CE) |Main Hall = |Other names = |Pilgrimage = |festival = |Rituals = |location = {{ill|Shiroi|qid=Q519187|1=Shiroi}} |coordinates = {{Coord|35.799339|N|140.09024|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Benzaiten|qid=Q818468|1=Benzaiten}}; {{ill|Dragon god|qid=Q1206058|1=Dragon god}} }} '''Benzaiten''' (弁財天) is a {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}} shrine located on the island within the "Kiyodo no Izumi" (a Chiba Prefecture Designated Historic Site) in {{ill|Kiyodo, Shiroi|ja|清戸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyodo, Shiroi|1=Kiyodo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16279521}}, {{ill|Shiroi|en|Shiroi|qid=Q519187|lt=Shiroi, Chiba|1=Shiroi}}. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Benzaiten|ja|弁財天|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benzaiten|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁才天}} * {{ill|Ryūjin|ja|竜神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 龍神}} == History == According to the origin story passed down through the nearby {{ill|Yakuō-ji (Shiroi)|ja|薬王寺 (白井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakuō-ji (Shiroi)|qq=}} (a Tendai Buddhist temple), this shrine was established during the {{ill|Daidō|en|Daidō|qid=Q1373191|lt=Daidō Era|1=Daidō}} (806–810 CE) and has enshrined both Benzaiten and Ryūjin since its founding. == Cultural Properties == * '''Chiba Prefecture Designated Historic Site''' **Kiyodo no Izumi with Woodblocks''' These include woodblocks bearing an inscription dated to September of the Bunsei 11 (1828), associated with the shrine. == location == * 602 Kiyodo, Shiroi, Chiba Prefecture (within the {{ill|Funabashi Country Club|ja|船橋カントリークラブ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funabashi Country Club|qq=}} grounds) == External Links == * [http://city.shiroi.chiba.jp/html/bunkazai-index.html Shiroi City Cultural Properties] {{shinto-stub|qq=}} {{Munakata Faith|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|弁財天 (白井市)|version=83465451|comment=Imported full ja history}}
